body.title: Palace rules: update .TheIgors refs to .unseen_university
body.result: 8 palace nodes updated via psql: .TheIgors→.unseen_university, ~/TheIgors→~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity, TheIgors work→UU project work; skills/* nodes untouched (reference skill files at ~/.claude which are correct)
body.description:
11 palace nodes under theigors/rules/* and theigors/skills/* contain .TheIgors or ~/TheIgors paths. Skills like audit-smell and audit-precode read these via memory_get() at sprint time — the stale paths send wrong guidance.

Critical: theigors/rules/database says Runtime dir ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ (should be ~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001/).

Affected palace nodes:
  theigors/rules/database, theigors/rules/cc-minion, theigors/rules/commits,
  theigors/rules/igor-constraints, theigors/rules/safeguards,
  theigors/skills (and subkeys), theigors/glossary, theigors/slates

**Affected files:** Postgres memory_palace table (no source files)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; palace is the authoritative reference; update in-place via psql
**Scope boundary:** IN: replace .TheIgors with .unseen_university in palace rule content. OUT: renaming the theigors/ palace namespace (keep the path prefix, only fix content)
**Completion criteria:** no palace node under theigors/ contains .TheIgors in content; skills reading these rules get correct paths
